sharedEntities.description: Core entity representing a loan in the system with its attributes, flows from UI to AI service for queries and generates events via Hooks for notifications
Represents a conversation between user and AI about loans, created in UI and managed by AI service

dataFlows.name: Loan History Query Flow
dataFlows.description: User queries loan history through natural language in UI, gets AI-powered responses
steps: User selects loan and asks question in COS.Lending.Selling.UI
Request forwarded to cos-lending-selling-ai via /chat or /crb/ai/loan
AI service processes question using AWS Bedrock LLM
Response streamed back to UI via Server-Sent Events

dataFlows.name: Loan Status Change Notification Flow
dataFlows.description: System notifies users when loan status changes occur
steps: Loan status change detected in backend system
UI potentially receives notification and updates display

integrationPoints.description: UI sends user questions to AI service and receives responses about loan history and details
UI receives notifications about loan status changes and other events published by the Hooks service
AI service streams responses back to the UI token by token for a responsive chat experience

patterns.description: Used to notify interested parties about loan state changes through a hooks system
Used to progressively deliver AI responses to improve perceived responsiveness
Maintains conversation context across multiple user interactions with the AI

ambiguities: Exact mechanism for how COS.Lending.Selling.UI consumes notifications published by COS.Lending.Selling.Hooks is not defined
The specific loan attributes that can be queried via the AI service in cos-lending-selling-ai are not fully enumerated
How the UI in COS.Lending.Selling.UI displays or processes BatchPurchaseCompleted events from COS.Lending.Selling.Hooks is unclear
